rulings.Case Title: GUARDIANSHIP OF NICOLE PETERSEN
rulings.Calendar Matter: FILING OF INVENTORY
rulings.Rulings: hearing. appearance required. second amended final inventory filed does not have an attachment 1, which is required and on which the account number and value is listed. in addition, there is no date of appointment for the guardian on page 1 as required and no page 2 of the I & A mandatory form filed. if a proper inventory is filed by noon on Friday, July 29, 2016, AND a file stamped copy of the corrected second amended final inventory is delivered to this examiner in Room 202 no later than 12:30 p.m. on Friday, July 29, 2016 the appearance will be excused. NOTE-->there must be a page 1 with the date of appointment, page 2, and attachment #1 - 3 pages total. if a proper inventory cannot be filed, the Court to consider whether changes to the guardianship must be made.
